# SERP Strategists - AI Growth Operator

> Governed AI operator that continuously improves website SEO and GEO performance. It finds issues, ranks opportunities, ships approved work, and monitors results.

## What we do

SERP Strategists is an AI Growth Operator that:
- Crawls websites and detects SEO issue types automatically
- Fixes technical SEO with approval gates, logs, and rollback-ready actions
- Optimizes for GEO so pages are easier to cite in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews
- Creates and publishes SEO-optimized content targeting keyword gaps
- Tracks rankings, organic traffic, and AI citations over time
- Learns from shipped work so the next recommendation is better

## Who we serve

Founders, developers, and small teams who want execution without agency overhead.

## Pricing

- **Free**: Full site audit, issue prioritization, GEO readiness score - 1 site, no fixes
- **Growth**: $49/month - governed fixes, content workflows, ranking monitoring - 1 site
- **Scale**: $99/month - full automation, GEO optimization, competitor tracking - 3 sites

All paid plans include a 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

## Key concepts we cover

- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
- AI Overviews optimization
- Schema markup and JSON-LD
- Core Web Vitals
- Internal linking strategy
- Keyword cannibalization
- Technical SEO audits
- Perplexity AI citation optimization
- Governed autonomy and approval workflows
